textByHashes.ea5d6bd2749cf3e8aba66f06e6709761e92df8de: Ah, you again. What do you want?
textByHashes.c5fe0f47990714647997e85d09b548db06a31ab6: That eye on it... That is the symbol of the Order of Wizards. What's all this about?
textByHashes.45c513144bcf80c4082ab59d3713334fffbee0e1: And we gave you knowledge on the Abyss in return. We owe you no further favours.
textByHashes.0e4e12046b537a8efb5cb19020e8d3bf411a90a7: I hope you're not about to tell me that you shared our secrets with the Saradominists?
textByHashes.3bcf5c2f4f74736acfcdad2e80e10374fcfb813b: Then where did you get the amulet?
textByHashes.e3cf44172c8ed6268841bd6187b591a6b164d7af: There's something off about all of this. Show it to me again.
textByHashes.bf3fb41bd6dc696f6fdf3416dd75fd6ebf743146: Just a spell to tell me more about it. It seems this amulet is very unusual.
textByHashes.08bee05574163b5c6f871026a2c5e8cf59368996: Very well, but first you must do something for me. Bring me a bucket of water and a strong cup of tea.
textByHashes.5c3065259db75afc9f275bb07ff107a7644365d5: That's right. The tea seller just north east of here can give you one. He owes me, in fact, so just tell him Herbert sent you.
textByHashes.1afaf94f7fa0ffabfd2c0ffcd52bde32765eb6e7: Zamorak: Ah, you again. What do you want?
textByHashes.a57528d6250e060ca866d6fe6532e5a8b64698d9: Do you have a bucket of water and a strong cup of tea?
textByHashes.8bdb283de1b99140ce96409dfad45513094a129a: I will not help you until you bring them to me. The tea seller just north east of here can give you a strong cup of tea. Just tell him Herbert sent you.
textByHashes.4c0f10f33d3923ae6e0d598c73bc7b080e5614f6: I will not help you until you bring them to me.
textByHashes.13186cde2269710bf8e516b4b657483621da0cab: Aaah, nothing like a nice cuppa tea!
textByHashes.25fc95dda72ffe4d8f683d00bc97380b3d0695de: Right, a deal is a deal, but the spell to determine the origin of that amulet will only work from the Abyss, so you'll need to have the initiate there perform it for you.
textByHashes.5a30a15393384a21456e9d8fc3371b2fc844f4d7: Meet me in the Wilderness when you're ready to be teleported there.
textByHashes.0506ce2a502e43cb945401527aa5ee8926f47fb5: From the middle of Varrock? What if someone is watching?
textByHashes.9ee0f998d2d7b1dfa1d36b6f69f8cd2d189d7b28: Fine, but don't expect me to make a habit of this. I will offer you a single teleport from here directly to the initiate in the Abyss. Make sure you are definitely ready.
textByHashes.9a108ef23459de7a3d301d1ae8422a32bff3ff58: Ah, that. While time passes slower in the Abyss, the initiate maintaining the rift has still been there for quite a while. He needs a good bath.
textByHashes.fd05613bea2908c2604f6496af56e838d1b29ec4: Exactly. Now, are you ready to be teleported? Don't forget, this is a one-time offer. In future, you'll need to meet me in the Wilderness to access the Abyss.
textByHashes.09c74223a23b8aa996f92085b5fc6161a1b219a0: Well then return to me when you are, but try not to waste too much of my time.
textByHashes.be092bb3bd62477bf1de7b30523dddf5c873d8f8: The spell to determine the origin of that amulet will only work from the Abyss, so you'll need to have the initiate there perform it for you.
textByHashes.ae7928ef6d77708f9f3374958b796ffe1a7e593a: Are you ready to be teleported there? Don't forget, this is a one-time offer. In future, you'll need to meet me in the Wilderness to access the Abyss.
textByHashes.8c25ba78cdb2b4120d5a1e71b860ba256d372dcf: I already gave you your one-time teleport to the Abyss from here, so you'll need to meet me in the Wilderness if you want teleporting there.
textByHashes.291399701760ea8d3b7dda4e8275175b66c8c543: Then why are you talking to me? You have what you need.
textByHashes.adbb68cb17519644cb7ca59ac2b6f87e94951aa8: Ah yes, the one to trace that amulet. Don't think I didn't notice that you modified the transmission spell I put on it. Next time you need help, we might not be so willing.
textByHashes.2fff84f8f31269496749d8167722ecb7d5b69020: And does this 'we' include the Order of Wizards?
textByHashes.0c4cd680d725cd3f194fa8f65e31e46bf3d60dfe: I knew it! It's just like them to play with magic they don't understand. First they burnt down the Wizards' Tower, now they're opening uncontrollable abyssal rifts!
textByHashes.44bf7cc0bdd68b84ef7eb084044910560bcc849d: Perhaps the fools should leave the dangerous magic to us next time!
textByHashes.99c1d7a8c1b811d421594996d728d3a0ce1db5ce: Hmm... probably the flesh of an abyssal creature. Why do you ask?
textByHashes.1ec449949b7821bc009cdcc3c1ab8f5835bbac91: You've been spending too much time with your friends in the Order of Wizards! I know that we Zamorakians have a bad reputation, but do you really think we'd be so barbaric?
textByHashes.52793e298b4c5d5255947d35ac913a5c6df0f43d: Ah, you mean that accursed Solus!
textByHashes.0875b4a0dc777892bcb6f0919b2e02f94369c834: You are working for the Temple Knights correct?
textByHashes.1b5b635704cbb2da78068fad23dc0a1d6c5861af: No, don't deny it, I recognise the magical signature of your Communication Orb, a very nice piece of equipment indeed.
textByHashes.0d0add2084d668e01a8a35025f97779ba4e9693e: I will tell you what I know in exchange for it, I believe such a device could be very useful to my research...
textByHashes.d7ddf7bbeadb5e127a731539a468bcbe6020e5a7: Ah well, it was worth a try, but I did not seriously expect you to part with it.
textByHashes.71c22e2b5ad6016dbf9bd7e7a15ce51daafe4467: I have little information, and would give it freely to make sure Solus is... disposed of... but unfortunately I am somewhat... financially distraught at the moment due to a recent... incident.
textByHashes.f4833956be9253acbb73ad9da9bf6c2e85c5f67b: ...Yes. He took a large degree of my research into various things as well, but my research is inside my mind and easily replaceable, the money I possessed was essential for my experimentation, and as I have no real skills to speak of, is not so easily replaceable...
textByHashes.b920c0c2e82764d055f5e89bc29931dc6dd1141c: No... not as such. You know of the substance known as 'rune essence' yes?
textByHashes.466630eb05be2df00dcdb90bbb662f71e5212765: A small number of those will allow me to create runes from them, which I may then sell and get myself back on my feet.
textByHashes.98b29506a2077c2dae40acab5bb9f5f96c46eda0: Twenty parts of rune essence is the price for my information. You may take it or leave it...
textByHashes.d1b2738979e34cb99793a34793c0615a7ac49f01: I do indeed. My price for this information is 20 pieces of rune essence.
textByHashes.d9f7ffefee0980081575de4b492bb591baf08436: I will not haggle you on my price. 20 Rune essences, and not a single essence less.
textByHashes.2109685bc64145319f31966aa422c67ac02a4071: Well...I suppose. See, we found this ancient altar, but it was pretty broken so the Z.M.I. sent some of its researchers to try and repair it.
textByHashes.209d3bd521bf0b5c22ad1286aa18491893b96aa1: Pretty well - only one died. Still, they got it working...sort of. This ancient technology can be tricky.
textByHashes.3f2055f5567d022b5e6bd1881064efe718c46940: This one works, just not as you'd expect. You put pure essence in, but get random runes back. Some of them we don't even know how to craft!
textByHashes.61eeb0fbb25a9c0ddff2db587764835518a016e6: I don't think so. The mages don't like outsiders going in; they'll probably attack you. They only patrol the short path, though, so if you used the long path, through a tunnel near the entrance, you'd probably be safe.
textByHashes.3282d3cdd8b91d5d612e073442f2a25e718aa799: This isn't the place to talk. Visit me in Varrock's Chaos Temple if you have something to discuss. Unless you're here to teleport or buy something?
textByHashes.675d47a0c007bc4fbb3b0f3a707c86132bf2794a: Ah yes, the one that led those fools in the Order of Wizards to open an uncontrollable abyssal rift! Perhaps they should leave the dangerous magic to us next time!
textByHashes.bb4b15a0ae00feef1cb6ea15ebcab503bd211399: Not to mention that they tried to convince you that we wrote that incantation on human flesh! Their lies never cease to amaze me!
textByHashes.c524795f3e7ba47f7935d42a01e6e68791dbd2f7: It is a hard place to describe. We often refer to it as another plane, but that isn't quite accurate. If anything, it is more like a plane that sits between all other planes.
textByHashes.819b07ccbc53974d85ef8121151013b037a3638c: In truth, nothing at all. However, it has everything to do with teleportation. You see, time and space work differently in the Abyss.
textByHashes.defbec53254b890683e20442b23404ef8679f429: For example, you can travel to the Abyss, walk a few steps and then exit, only to find yourself somewhere completely different from where you entered. You might even find yourself on a different plane.
textByHashes.04831c619ea92e5c4b060b60c991c742e3d16da7: You can also enter the Abyss and spend days there, but on your return, only moments have passed.
textByHashes.d46ec96b531cdbde8ef30ac250771e576468a5af: This is why the Abyss is so useful. It can be used as an effective hub for teleportation. In fact, all teleportation that we know of uses the Abyss, you just don't realise it.
textByHashes.56ab595e32fd8fdf8db4ad87a2e239a334e9cb67: In some ways, I suppose you are. Whenever you use a teleport spell, that spell is actually travelling through the Abyss and using it to link two places together.
textByHashes.af31b52f88ea9f46301fc53a6ac2f592465c9bb3: No. Knowledge of the Abyss has existed for a long time, hence it being used for teleportation. However, we believe we may be the first to have properly gained access in centuries.
textByHashes.eda659fa892352312cbdeb4a4f617e64c87af7d9: By complete accident. One of our initiates was performing a routine teleportation experiment when something went wrong. Instead of ending up at their destination, they found themselves in the Abyss.
textByHashes.e62a46f40d38f53af5dfa33c8cf8ba11d8726441: Now, did you want something else?
textByHashes.c76c6da50468b3efa03d02a62b406258003c4af7: I suppose you have proven yourself trustworthy. We are a group of mages in service to Zamorak. Our group is called the Zamorak Magical Institute, or Z.M.I. for short.
textByHashes.c141200d3b2ad0138e782fd2005bf54295b27d69: Few actually know of us. Saradominist groups like the Order of Wizards hold sway over these lands, so we are forced to work in the shadows. However, make no mistake, our power far exceeds theirs.
textByHashes.a45f400655c3d4d98c6115d518268b6f656c23c2: And why would we? Did you know that the Order of Wizards wasn't always a Saradominist group? Once they allowed mages of all faiths to study with them, but they became greedy.
textByHashes.e558ea47760ac352a16a43716feff4d2359579e5: They started to desire more control. They banned Zamorakian wizards from certain areas of study, claiming them to be too dangerous. In reality, they just wanted that knowledge for themselves.
textByHashes.27a030170068dfba7d12f3414b0f25044449e04d: It all went wrong for them, of course. A Zamorakian wizard made a great breakthrough in teleportation magic, but the Saradominists stole his research.
textByHashes.4fc357af8426ef7f0d1c755c1669de9a670a9f0f: They used it to perform a ritual, but their lack of understanding caused it to go wrong. The entire Wizards' Tower burnt down. Many were killed, and years of research was destroyed.
textByHashes.5e1297ea3ca5a48df743797af971fff1c2e4a713: Naturally, they blamed the Zamorakians. Claimed we intentionally burnt the tower down. After the tower was rebuilt, we were banished from the Order of Wizards and forced underground.
textByHashes.43fd0fad95d12b142557e036d7698d81413a4f9b: Ah! You have chosen some quite fantastic attire. Maybe you are not such a fool after all.
textByHashes.0862c30d116e099aae6ff0925d4c327f11fbb575: Meet me in Varrock's Chaos Temple. Here is not the place to talk.
textByHashes.eabff0886a13cf1e379d30ea6470e8177df16076: I already told you! Meet me in the Varrock Chaos Temple!
textByHashes.75a2c17bf21c9acaa93d62adbd8f7ac3ebb281e4: Ah, you again. What was it you wanted? The Wilderness is hardly the appropriate place for a conversation now, is it?
textByHashes.147337a3ce105020225cfc5b45fe2f89ef6b6c74: I do not conduct business in this pathetic city. Speak to me in the wilderness if you desire to purchase runes from me.
textByHashes.fb4bc7dc9a911d0b1e0550515ef6b5855caf4d76: Stranger, I warn you I have a low tolerance for idiocy.
textByHashes.08f297a58adeece37b3f6aa33e11ede4c778b634: Now are you going to stand here all day annoying me, or was there something that you actually wanted?
textByHashes.be76d3a294df96dd0e06a1de0c463e3a5e570433: Hmmm. Well, you may be right, the foolish Saradominists that own this pathetic city don't appreciate loyal Zamorakians, it is true.
textByHashes.558e30272cd0b8b9dd1218d8d21b32054b55b6cf: That is correct stranger. The mysteries of manufacturing Runes is a closely guarded secret of the Zamorakian brotherhood.
textByHashes.c6071b5f894b1f93b395af5e51e711488729bb42: Tell me, this is important: You know of the ancient temples? You have been to a place where this 'rune essence' material is freely available?
textByHashes.504002a875b42875f4ea7cec83732440e31ff33c: How did you get to such a place?
textByHashes.d0c9757456fbce8c8b3f1c0a233ab28127a0da2c: And there is an abundant supply of this 'essence' there you say?
textByHashes.8648e065c7a7def9befb1cf88f8eb5a6b7efc0ec: We occasionally manage to plunder small samples of this 'essence' and we have recently discovered these temples you speak of, but I have never heard of these talismans before, and I was certainly not aware that this 'essence'
textByHashes.d2e3a86616f2f0da763b300d3f48b5c454fd5f57: substance is a heavily stockpiled resource at the Wizards Tower.
textByHashes.553ff5681dd5315ab352ae96ddbeff7a8c235825: For many years there has been a struggle for power on this world. You may dispute the morality of each side as you wish, but the stalemate that exists between my Lord Zamorak
textByHashes.e84cd013f7cafd4dcf890bec8e65d52dbf332bd6: and that pathetic meddling fool Saradomin has meant that our struggles have become more secretive. We exist in a 'cold war' if you will, each side fearful of letting the other gain too much power, and each side
textByHashes.51e716ea51d17e656e40d53dd6794b4881169e0c: equally fearful of entering into open warfare for fear of bringing our struggles to the attention of... other beings.
textByHashes.3e613177304fc9eef3affec3510dbe9f95d79e11: Indeed. Amongst others. But you now tell me that the Saradominist Wizards have the capability to mass produce runes, I can only
textByHashes.26ba39f8621ba7b43a9793ad7e87f9b6f38df7f5: conclude that they have been doing so secretly for some time now.
textByHashes.84eba0f0e6fec8c3586c76222532d36bb11e3e1a: I implore you adventurer, you may or may not agree with my aims, but you cannot allow such a one-sided shift in the balance of power to occur.
textByHashes.816c2b799cb4bf1559ad966da0ccd7830d2ecd52: Will you help me and my fellow Zamorakians to access this 'essence' mine? In return I will share with you the research we have gathered.
textByHashes.217360b913f6c8c4ae4ad95bf349bc41f91de9a9: All I need from you is the spell that will teleport me to this essence mine. That should be sufficient for the armies of Zamorak to once more begin stockpiling magic for war.
textByHashes.7c81011eb63b8f34aa54bbeefe9479d934f1f548: What? Then how do you access this location?
textByHashes.7bc01947e9429edb05563802fcb8e4f10f9af076: Hmmm. Yes, yes I see. Very well then, you may still assist us in finding this mysterious essence mine.
textByHashes.7df588cc296b694f140b9c25c569eea4782ba566: I'll give you a scrying orb. I have cast a standard cypher spell upon it, so that it will absorb mystical energies that it is exposed to.
textByHashes.6b04f5bc60620818f093d3140df683a8a2d19d22: Bring it with you and teleport to the rune essence location, and it will absorb the mechanics of the spell and allow us to reverse-engineer the magic behind it.
textByHashes.5808d20d749e8fcced184de1208dfd5d696b1f55: The important part is that you must teleport to the essence location from three entirely separate locations.
textByHashes.d70b1e786adb3185b9c4515a8e51deaf51c59181: More than three may be helpful to us, but we need a minimum of three in order to triangulate the position of this essence mine.
textByHashes.e64c90f9c79bb5e5c05acebd93491acc5e167f87: Here's the scrying orb. If you encounter any difficulties speak to me again.
textByHashes.3f5ba031fa660b9844af901fc52b8f03f4dbe293: As you wish, stranger. I will achieve my goals elsewhere.
textByHashes.8eeef7cd6b391037027f158fe28a828d2d23f459: How dare you wear such disrespectful attire in this holy place? Remove them immediately if you wish to speak to me.
textByHashes.2bec93910bc74fff26cb1c23f6dcead28a781701: Well? Have you managed to use my scrying orb to obtain the information yet?
textByHashes.099a7a041042b202e33c10a2af4c01da72ca8e42: What? Incompetent fool. Take this. And do not make me regret allying myself with you.
textByHashes.d4365f10f7931efa927c39f2e7ff87b38fd4d11a: I can offer a replacement, but not if you have no room to accept it, fool.
textByHashes.93fd2c2cfd76d80c6674281e80feade18d50e837: I assumed the task to be self-explanatory. What is it you wish to know?
textByHashes.64e153f24bb585222ae8f59e5e254593cc55e88f: I am slightly concerned about your capability for this mission, if you cannot even recall such a simple task...
textByHashes.2f44be175ef1ffc758f0ffd0f0f6685a56a6196e: All I wish for you to do is to teleport to this 'rune essence' location from three different locations while carrying the scrying orb I gave you. It will collect the data as you teleport, and if you then
textByHashes.a5ba4952948f1b30d00ff3651bd21ecaf089bbdc: bring it to me I will be able to use it to further my own investigations.
textByHashes.4c734a84c390c0a9dcc16b065362c37ed216eba3: That is good to know. Is there something else you need clarifying?
textByHashes.935934895360e7de727930f4400a2f3f853b2e15: Well now, I can certainly understand that attitude. Let me assure you of this; from what you tell me, you have discovered a way of gaining these 'essence stones' quickly and efficiently, yet it sounds as though your
textByHashes.fc37b4ab9c1177710b9bca20b7957105899e56c3: method of reaching the temples which are used to bind these essences is random and counter-productive.
textByHashes.7cd46b712237e973b13acc2fbd4e9994ff040caa: I, on the other hand, have information on quickly accessing these temples, yet my methods of procuring this 'essence' are time consuming and useless as a means of mass production.
textByHashes.6c8049d4b1825e1ffc93806244f9fcc6b2fe4df0: I think you can see for yourself how this may benefit both of us; You allow me the knowledge of finding plentiful essence, and I will in return show you the secret of these
textByHashes.50a6725d691d5d5f50d38cd71d336d4ed9dd9965: Very well, if it makes you feel any better; I promise you that any knowledge you provide me with, absolutely will not be used in the service of anything more evil than what I was already planning on doing
textByHashes.da5636af3ed17ca68b5b4a3a4fdedc16854f23f3: I hope that sets your conscience at rest.
textByHashes.333671b2abbb068f7ad1fb4380f178356b3a66dc: It is not a 'crystal ball thingy'. It is a precision made magical instrument called a scrying orb. Do you have some particular need for another one?
textByHashes.8a2c4e0bad31a4b516dfeb7214a5ace9e8ff555a: Then no, no you may not have another one. One will be sufficient for the task at hand.
textByHashes.be2074eaa4057984a613624bcc607daf1d5e1911: No you haven't. I can see that you have it there in your backpack. Now quit your foolishness and get on with the task in hand!
textByHashes.a05623015ab3f048201b6233f6d324eb6a473bc4: No you haven't. You have it in your bank. Now get on with it!
textByHashes.e81e541fee40d717ba57e0260b55f84454761ef2: That is good to hear, stranger. Bring me my orb back when you have successfully made those teleports.
textByHashes.2bc7deb850513dc050674d3d14d161e7c6477fe3: Excellent. Give it here, and I shall examine the findings. Speak to me in a small while.
textByHashes.df0be562d523311a7d176892eb2411691e1c1052: Indeed, a deal is always a deal.
textByHashes.c53b8e0bc9431f1d3a444c8b19264de7ca2f9851: I offer you three things as reward for your efforts on behalf of my Lord Zamorak;
textByHashes.a0dc281b35924c73dee19d67c4d28f9228c62ae9: The first is knowledge. I offer you my collected research on the abyss. I also offer you 1000 points of experience in Runecrafting for your trouble.
textByHashes.5eefccc7f5aee13be96f3bb98169fa2baa848b10: Your second gift is convenience. Here, you may take this pouch I discovered amidst my research. You will find it to have certain... interesting properties.
textByHashes.cea724d03feed7ea28d1651a4eab0778239330dc: Your final gift is that of movement. I will from now on offer you a teleport to the abyss whenever you should require it.
textByHashes.6eca4cbbd3faf1ab6cd65947b739c55b857dc69b: Huh? Abyss? What are you talking about? You told me that you would help me with Runecrafting!
textByHashes.accfbec562c7ea424308c453e2ea752a8f14ecaf: And so I have done. Read my research notes, they may enlighten you somewhat.
textByHashes.788b39647b1fc3d9b62942abb1ea47640514c8ec: My primary research responsibility was not towards the manufacture of runes, this is true.
textByHashes.1b8fed86a0ff88975c05000f088311faf7920e64: Rather, I was investigating an error that occurred to one of our initiates in a routine teleportation experiment.
textByHashes.de5855afa386fb8efd52ae37fb99372e11cc493b: My discovery was this 'abyssal' space, and as a side effect, as documented in the research notes I have given you, I discovered the existence of these 'temples' used to create runes.
textByHashes.942ee0baf6a26899dd020d5e7f8554e405b39c56: Fortunate for both of us, I would say. As I say, read my research notes, it should all become clear.
textByHashes.4b4f603e2704b99050f4ccf193250f764f326686: My colleague inside the abyss may be of help to you as well.
textByHashes.d58429922feb08d0427951ca3fe2960c6e3c7c5e: Well, the creatures there ARE particularly offensive...
textByHashes.bffdcab43fa88f4747a17931ed1d26d8b02521f8: No, I mean they hunt and attack any visitors to their dimension on sight. This is not the danger however.
textByHashes.971d12f591281feb6c4857e7cdae153e68de0d8f: No. Unfortunately the magic we have had to use to retain a portal to the abyss open and effective is derived from Lord Zamorak himself.
textByHashes.fa3cf681b7239b6b84dea2234e7bd5835adf7e0d: Well, he has his occasional quirks. In this case it means that when you enter this dimension you will be 'skulled' and your prayer will be drained.
textByHashes.c3f27ef80d6a14f54f817b31326ec56dacfc336d: This makes it somewhat more dangerous than other places you may be used to.
textByHashes.69bf45236b6b8aca76e67c2e8bf1addb7e5bd935: Was there anything else you wanted?
textByHashes.8cc6a2f859b1bdcb799d3d89ddca61c0d5509b42: No, not from here. The use of my Lord Zamoraks magic in this land will draw too much attention to myself.
textByHashes.505faa7747f2dd3b56dad38086b0fd9ae884aef2: Meet me in the wilderness where you spoke to me before, and right click to find the 'teleport' option.
textByHashes.e43cf36927a706a4e307fa0e9520357013e8dbc4: I should be able to improve my stock of runes thanks to your assistance locating the essence site too, so feel free to stop by if you require any specific runes.
textByHashes.b61aab46aaf70bcfa769c140b452bce9365ba0e4: If you want to talk, this isn't the place for it. Meet me in Varrock's Chaos Temple, by the rune shop. Unless you're here to buy something?
textByHashes.89d63f677f527ad3c58e43d504c76acca38d75da: I already told you to meet me in Varrock's Chaos Temple, by the rune shop. Unless you're here to buy something?
textByHashes.88fd825145bba73fe7469418d4a50a73fe8210a6: Ah, you again. The Wilderness is hardly the appropriate place for a conversation now, is it? What was it you wanted?
textByHashes.573235359199d25fd3f249d0a14e80edadb49ded: So why did you approach me?
textByHashes.a43ecd617da4579db58c73cf9560430f9da826f7: Well I can't go doing it in the middle of Varrock, can I? In case you hadn't noticed, I'm a servant of Zamorak. The Saradominists have made sure that people like me are not welcome in these parts.
textByHashes.58d7ebd814168c544c17e06b46a8cbb370103718: Well we craft them of course.
textByHashes.421484ab62bb62ec2785bb143f6aaea5a8221c83: My associates and I. Despite the best attempts of the Saradominists, there's still more of us around than they'd like.
textByHashes.4d4240935c9e407e11299bea2fb7d208740faf27: Ha! I'm sure they'd love to, but we have methods of runecrafting that they can only dream of!
textByHashes.aa2d4164e2f16f2ed6657d2a8607b72edb230351: Why would I? You are not a member of our institute. How do I know you won't just go and share all of our secrets with those Saradominist fools in the Order of Wizards.
textByHashes.71fff1484264a9145985669fc3946ae9dee35a4a: How? What do you have to offer?
textByHashes.ddd74608be046cf8c184daec6e9ffdaa3c30ca12: Until recently, our runecrafting secrets allowed us to produce runes at a far superior rate compared to the inept Order of Wizards, but something has changed.
textByHashes.eab15388cef12cc3a191f679c5a8518e07c3ec8b: From what we can gather, they've somehow rediscovered how to access the lost Rune Essence Mine.
textByHashes.d932b83296ffc8ac36799e2861f27e2ac7bab223: You did what? You helped the Order of Wizards?
textByHashes.348de46e4558e6869b1bfcb764f1d6524242245e: So you're a mercenary with no allegiance? Not the type I like working with, but if you have knowledge of the Rune Essence Mine, I seemingly have little choice.
textByHashes.9877e3fa62602d491786913fddfb4dd0ab09ac7f: Alright, if you help us access the Rune Essence Mine, we will share our runecrafting secrets with you in return.
textByHashes.5f054556810e3e7a414f49c9e1de9e7b75462cbb: You did? Perhaps I underestimated you.
textByHashes.aabb37cbf89a78b53098122f97e19f383e844588: Good. Now, all I need from you is the spell that will teleport me to the Rune Essence Mine.
textByHashes.ab38ae66c1a17f6506759875db696223440fa39e: What? Then how do you get there.
textByHashes.82d16831e8d6bd43cc0e3415fdc5ac677c41f07e: Hmm... I see. That makes this slightly more complex, but no matter. You can still help us.
textByHashes.0c0db3c9fa4a13e2ee0c509af8a7721a0653281b: I'll give you a scrying orb with a standard cypher spell cast upon it. The orb will absorb mystical energies that it is exposed to.
textByHashes.e4fe7f975674d1ceb2ad1e34e20bd4a4da72c23e: If you teleport to the Rune Essence Mine from three different locations, the orb will absorb the energies of the spell and allow us to reverse-engineer the magic behind it.
textByHashes.d7207cce31e5d204205b5a3849264ccb7178194b: Do you know of three different people who can teleport you there?
textByHashes.a9f9eedfe22f1bfeeb3f679695b666f529c3faf7: Well if not, I'm sure one of those fools in the Order of Wizards can tell you. Now, here's the orb.
textByHashes.4acaac047c567e66b455c81d5a5124c58327b865: Fine. I will find another way.
textByHashes.d455f7ea9d62ae8c039d795a2ac80223fd495fdb: I will be here once you have decided.
textByHashes.db8b9f55c42a9eedc167626c2a2a56db38a328e3: Even if you speak the truth, it takes more than just being a follower of Zamorak to gain the secrets of the institute. You would need to offer something in return.
textByHashes.ce986b13b3fe5e407936f0fd37b691f4fc8b4787: You did what? You helped the Order of Wizards? I thought you claimed to be a servant of Zamorak?
textByHashes.cbd6bc38a589b672c538b6ff4750b36369deb35c: Then give me one good reason why I shouldn't have you teleported into the depths of a volcano!
textByHashes.453157dd1496408c9250d761cc303a0eafb41cc9: You would help both sides for your own gain? I suppose as a Zamorakian, I can respect that, even if I don't like it.
textByHashes.365d1b71d80a842f27020ecaa0d82f5b2591736b: Be glad that I am merciful! Now go!
textByHashes.3ae8b8ce0d6981f9c4db2f54f4c067bbb08f5803: Then you have no place here! Leave, before I make you!
textByHashes.16d90910aa564c80d6aabdda9265edbcf03eede5: Then you should be gone, for I am very busy.
textByHashes.ca82fd029994abd3d370b448cde892250813ee45: You again. Have you considered my offer? If you help us access the Rune Essence Mine, we will share our runecrafting secrets with you in return.
textByHashes.fb0244f30c095e516c3f8e019f8bc6d2328abe1a: You again. Have you managed to use that scrying orb to obtain the information I need?
textByHashes.05eb74ec53d362e764e3ba0c530aa59f2c01d573: Fool! Take this, and don't lose it this time!
textByHashes.562b3056a390724095c1e47af737e0d5fe61a1b4: You must carry it with you and teleport to the Rune Essence Mine from three different locations. Return to me once you have done so.
textByHashes.d3331e4983ad8866801663f6609c83548ea001d9: Well it is of no use there. Bring it to me.
textByHashes.2d0851479b35476e0c8224524619d9104789e0f6: Right, let's take a look at this orb...
textByHashes.f5ea06b2ed7b0b27a6a26d55c16378cb1c708722: Yes, this will do nicely. Once again, the Zamorak Magical Institute has overcome the Order of Wizards!
textByHashes.de54985ad8e76cbc23faafd018d4bc7e8bbb2c9e: You have done well. Now, time for us to uphold our end of the bargin.
textByHashes.7ac92c4309a8cfcab7578db6425866e77431b6ac: The reason we are able to craft so many runes is because we do not visit the runic altars in the traditional way. Instead, we have found a way to teleport to them directly.
textByHashes.1961cca747fdb4b63e617b2e327e5bd9e0e2c08c: Via another plane known as the Abyss. It is a complex place that cannot be easily explained, but I will share our research notes with you so you may better understand it.
textByHashes.76e0380f77e94dabffc1e5f55f2a88fb1fe5d511: Yes. Visit me in the Wilderness whenever you wish to be teleported there. Just be careful, for it is a dangerous place. Still, I'm sure you'll agree that the risk is worth the reward.
textByHashes.e58e72bd409fe73119d6163ff79fda8d3dacf4a6: There are creatures there that will hunt and attack any visitors on sight. The magic we use for teleporting there can also be a bit... unstable.
textByHashes.9f6a2715764815c0445fcfacdb8cff8136060d2e: Just don't expect to be using any prayers in there.
textByHashes.b6f2c7d51b1cec181d786a6feeacf63ae4254a35: Anyway, you may also have this pouch as well. I'm sure you will find it useful. Now, we're done here.
